articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’ - TechCrunch
articles.description: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.
articles.content:
Apple’s next Worldwide Developers Conference will be held from June 8 to June 12 online and at its headquarters in Cupertino, California, the company announced Monday.

articles.title: Why Drinking More Water Isn’t Enough To Stop Kidney Stones - SciTechDaily
articles.description: A major study finds that simply encouraging people to drink more water may not be enough to stop kidney stones from coming back.
articles.content: A large clinical study tested whether advanced hydration programs could prevent kidney stones from returning, but the results revealed a surprising gap between intention and long-term adherence. The … [+5294 chars]
